title: Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple
tagline: Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple (திருமணஞ்சேரி உத்வாகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple at Thirumanancheri in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple (திருமணஞ்சேரி உத்வாகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple at Thirumanancheri in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva. He is called Udhvaganathar. His consort is known as Kokhila.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai block
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai block is a revenue block in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 54 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Mayiladuthurai taluk
topPlaces.description: Mayiladuthurai taluk is a taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the district is the town of Mayiladuthurai and villages include Agarakkirangudi, Elanthangudi and Mozhaiyur.

topPlaces.name: Kalyanasundareswarar Temple, Thiruvelvikudi
topPlaces.description: Kalyanasundareswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Thiruvelvikudi in the Kuthalam taluk of Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Kuthalam block
topPlaces.description: Kuthalam block is a revenue block in the Kuthalam taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. There are a total of 51 panchayat villages in this block.

topPlaces.name: Kuthalam taluk
topPlaces.description: Kuthalam taluk is a taluk in the Mayiladuthurai District in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The administrative headquarters is the town of Kuthalam.

topPlaces.name: Kuthalam
topPlaces.description: Kuthalam (also known as Tiruthuruthi) is a panchayat town and Taluk in Mayiladuthurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The language being spoken is Tamil.

topPlaces.name: Alangudi, Mayiladuthurai
topPlaces.description: Alangudi is a village in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Uthavedeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Uthavedeeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple in the town of Kuthalam in the Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (101 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (102 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirumanancheri Udhvaganathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mayiladuthurai block, Mayiladuthurai taluk, Kalyanasundareswarar Temple, Thiruvelvikudi, Kuthalam block, Kuthalam taluk.
